notes: Core Tetris mechanics work including SRS kicks, hold, ghost, and scoring, but drawPieceIcon has a bug (references p.type which is undefined on the object), the gravity soft-drop logic double-moves per tick causing erratic behavior, and the lock timer accumulation inside the gravity loop is incorrect leading to occasional premature locking.

Core Tetris is mostly present, but there are notable implementation flaws including a likely undeclared global dt, incorrect/misaligned piece icon rendering logic, and several nonstandard gameplay details that keep it from being a solid or polished build.
